title: PogFile
description: Output of phase2 (POG construction). One file per Lean source file. Contains a Proof Ordering Graph G_T = (V, E) per declaration, as defined in paper §2.1. Each POG records the equivalence class of the input proof under reorderings that preserve dependency constraints. Coarsening: footprints are name-level (no AST positions), so dependencies may be over-approximated — sound but not complete.

source_file.description: Path to the Lean source file (mirrors trace.schema.json).

type.description: Lean expression string for the hypothesis type (i.e. the proposition it inhabits).

goal.description: Lean expression string for the goal g.

TacticSummary.description: Σ(a, Γ, g) = (U, π₁, …, πₘ) from §3.1.

directly_used.description: U ⊆ Γ: hypothesis names directly consumed by this tactic.

dependency_maps.description: One map per output branch. Each map is total over the residual context Γᵢ: for every h ∈ Γᵢ, lists the hypotheses in Γ it depends on. Pass-through hypotheses map to [h] (themselves).

additionalProperties.description: πᵢ(h) ⊆ Γ: parent hypotheses that h depends on.

Footprint.description: Coarsened tactic footprint Φ(a, Γ, g) = (D, M, ρ). Positions µ are dropped (name-level coarsening — see FUTURE.md).

uses.description: D ⊆ Γ: hypothesis names used but not modified by this tactic. D = U \ M_hyps.

modifies_hyps.description: M_hyps ⊆ Γ: hypothesis names modified by this tactic (dropped, renamed, or whose proposition changed).

modifies_goal.description: True iff the goal is modified (i.e. ∃ i. gᵢ ≠ g) on at least one output branch.

rho.description: Per-output-branch forward propagation, coarsened to a name map. rho[i] maps each name in {names(Γ), '⊢'} to the set of names in {names(Γᵢ), '⊢'} it propagates to. The literal '⊢' key/value denotes the goal slot. Co-indexed with TacticNode.output_obligations.

PogNode.description: A tactic node extended with its computed footprint and branch path. Preserves all phase 1 TacticNode fields verbatim; phase 3 (reconstruction) and phase 4 (support) read these directly.

id.description: Unique identifier within the declaration, inherited from phase 1 (DFS pre-order).

input_obligation.description: Proof obligation (Γ, g) at which this tactic is executed.

output_obligations.description: Residual obligations (Γ₁,g₁),…,(Γₘ,gₘ). Empty for a leaf. Ordered consistently with child_ids and summary.dependency_maps.

parent_id.description: ID of the parent tactic node, or null for the root.

child_ids.description: IDs of child tactic nodes in branch order: child_ids[i] is the root of the sub-proof for output_obligations[i].

branch_path.description: B(a): sequence of branch indices chosen at branching ancestors of a, with '*' suffix on the final entry (or as a standalone entry) if a is itself branching. Examples: [] for a non-branching node in a linear chain; ['*'] for the root when the root is branching; ['1', '0*'] for the second child of root whose first child is itself branching.

PogEdge.description: Dependency edge aᵢ ≺ aⱼ per Definition 2 (§2.1). 'modify' = both endpoints modify the same propagated name; 'use' = the source modifies a name the target uses. Edges are minimal: no intermediate k satisfies the same condition relative to to.

from.description: Source node id (the aᵢ in aᵢ ≺ aⱼ).

to.description: Target node id (the aⱼ in aᵢ ≺ aⱼ).

ProofOrderingGraph.description: G_T = (V, E) for a single declaration. V = nodes, E = edges.

statement.description: Lean expression string for the theorem statement.

root_tactic_id.description: ID of the root tactic node (the first tactic applied to the initial obligation).

root_obligation.description: Initial proof obligation, i.e. input_obligation of the root tactic node. Lifted to the POG level for phase 3 convenience.

nodes.description: Flat list of all POG nodes. Tree structure is encoded via parent_id and child_ids.

edges.description: Dependency edges. If both modify- and use-dependence hold for the same (i,j), two distinct edges are emitted.
